The '''Fastblasters''' were the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] crew of the ''[[Fastblast]]'', and were affiliated with the [[Invids]]. Their membership included [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]]. The Fastblasters were the first pirate gang that [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], in his "Ghost [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]" guise, frightened into fleeing [[Courkrus]] and abandoning the Invids in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. After badly beating a trio from the crew, the Jedi declared that he would kill any Fastblasters he saw from then onward. The ''Fastblast'' fled three days later.

{{Ship-stub}}
